Document:
# Core Rule 2 - Do not be toxic [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2026-02-27[/italic][/color]
While you may appear to be a dick for roleplay when forgetting department duties, completing objectives, and escaping death, you must not contribute to toxicity. Toxicity includes spam, harassment, and disproportionate responses.
## Examples [color=#994444]Prohibited:[/color] - Spamming messages. - Harassing players. - Targeting players over multiple lives. - Arguing over multiple channels or without end. - Threatening ahelp against players.
